metadata.name: Assign Crew for a New Flight

description: A new flight has been added to the schedule. A crew scheduler must assign a full crew (pilots and cabin crew) to it.

nodes.task_description: Identify the aircraft type for the new flight to determine the required crew qualifications and number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the flight requires 2 pilots and 4 cabin crew qualified on the A320.

nodes.task_description: Find available and legal crew members based at the flight's origin city.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of available crew members.

nodes.task_description: Assign the crew members to the flight and publish the updated roster.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully builds a crew for the flight and updates the schedule.
